title: citrus grandis var. kotokan
intro: Citrus grandis var. kotokan, also known as the pomelo, is a variety of citrus fruit that is native to Southeast Asia and Australia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Citrus grandis var. kotokan include reducing fever, relieving coughs and colds, and aiding in digestion. Herbal preparations of Citrus grandis var. kotokan include tea, juice, and extracts, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
